SweepRemainingAsyncState.description: State model derived from SweepRemainingAsync TLA+ spec

SemaphoreValid.description: Verifier for invariant SemaphoreValid from SweepRemainingAsync spec

SemaphoreConsistent.message: SemaphoreConsistent violation: sem_count + Cardinality({t \in 1..NumTasks : sem_held[t]}) = MaxConcurrency
SemaphoreConsistent.description: Verifier for invariant SemaphoreConsistent from SweepRemainingAsync spec

NoCancellation.description: Verifier for invariant NoCancellation from SweepRemainingAsync spec

ExceptionCapturedAsResult.description: Verifier for invariant ExceptionCapturedAsResult from SweepRemainingAsync spec

AllOthersSucceedWhenGatherDone.description: Verifier for invariant AllOthersSucceedWhenGatherDone from SweepRemainingAsync spec

GatherRequiresAllTasksDone.message:
GatherRequiresAllTasksDone violation: gather_complete =>
        \A t \in 1..NumTasks :
            task_state[t] = "completed" \/ task_state[t] = "failed"
GatherRequiresAllTasksDone.description: Verifier for invariant GatherRequiresAllTasksDone from SweepRemainingAsync spec

FailedTaskSlotReleased.description: Verifier for invariant FailedTaskSlotReleased from SweepRemainingAsync spec

CompletedOrFailedReleaseSemaphore.description: Verifier for invariant CompletedOrFailedReleaseSemaphore from SweepRemainingAsync spec

RunningTasksHoldSemaphore.description: Verifier for invariant RunningTasksHoldSemaphore from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_SemaphoreValid.message: Assertion failed: SemaphoreValid — sem_count >= 0 /\ sem_count <= MaxConcurrency
assert_SemaphoreValid.description: Test assertion for SemaphoreValid from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_SemaphoreConsistent.message: Assertion failed: SemaphoreConsistent — sem_count + Cardinality({t \in 1..NumTasks : sem_held[t]}) = MaxConcurrency
assert_SemaphoreConsistent.description: Test assertion for SemaphoreConsistent from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_NoCancellation.description: Test assertion for NoCancellation from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_ExceptionCapturedAsResult.description: Test assertion for ExceptionCapturedAsResult from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_AllOthersSucceedWhenGatherDone.message:
Assertion failed: AllOthersSucceedWhenGatherDone — gather_complete =>
        \A t \in (1..NumTasks) \ {FailingTask} : results[t] = "ok"
assert_AllOthersSucceedWhenGatherDone.description: Test assertion for AllOthersSucceedWhenGatherDone from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_GatherRequiresAllTasksDone.condition:
gather_complete implies
        \A t in 1..NumTasks :
            task_state[t] = "completed" or task_state[t] = "failed"
assert_GatherRequiresAllTasksDone.message:
Assertion failed: GatherRequiresAllTasksDone — gather_complete =>
        \A t \in 1..NumTasks :
            task_state[t] = "completed" \/ task_state[t] = "failed"
assert_GatherRequiresAllTasksDone.description: Test assertion for GatherRequiresAllTasksDone from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_FailedTaskSlotReleased.description: Test assertion for FailedTaskSlotReleased from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_CompletedOrFailedReleaseSemaphore.description: Test assertion for CompletedOrFailedReleaseSemaphore from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_RunningTasksHoldSemaphore.message:
Assertion failed: RunningTasksHoldSemaphore — \A t \in 1..NumTasks :
        task_state[t] = "running" => sem_held[t]
assert_RunningTasksHoldSemaphore.description: Test assertion for RunningTasksHoldSemaphore from SweepRemainingAsync spec
